excerpt: Grant me the word, and the string that carries it…

sections.label: Pallavi
sections.ta:
சரஸ்வதி வந்தனம் செய்வோம்
சொல்லின் தேவியை பணிவோம்
sections.translit:
saraswathi vandhanam seivOm
sollin dhEviyai paNivOm
sections.en:
Let us offer salutations to Saraswathi;
let us bow to the goddess of speech.

sections.label: Anupallavi
sections.ta:
வீணை ஏந்திய கை காட்டு
அறிவின் ஒளியை நீ ஏற்று
sections.translit:
veeNai Endhiya kai kAttu
aRivin oLiyai nee EtRu
sections.en:
Show us the hand that holds the veena;
kindle in us the light of knowledge.

notes: Saraswathi, goddess of learning and the arts, is depicted holding a veena (lute), a book, and a garland. She is worshipped especially during Navaratri.
